sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ سُعَادُ مَقْهًى صَغِيرًا بِجَانِبِ الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Suad je pronašla mali kafić pored mora.
sentences.translationEn: Suad found a small cafe beside the sea.

sentences.translation: Ušla je i naručila kafu i kolač.
sentences.translationEn: She entered and ordered coffee and cake.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ عِنْدَ النَّافِذَةِ وَنَظَرَتْ إِلَى الْأَمْوَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Sjela je kraj prozora i gledala u valove.
sentences.translationEn: She sat by the window and watched the waves.
She spent a peaceful hour feeling relaxed.
